## Review Checklist

- [ ] Business logic changes include tests
- [ ] If tests were not written first, the PR explains why
- [ ] Risky changes call out rollback and impact
- [ ] No approval claims are made without evidence
- [ ] HANDOFF/TODO updates are planned after merge
